1.description: Commuting zone income quintiles. The map plots quintiles of local income growth at the commuting zone level between 2000 and 2006. Regions range from darker (largest negative shock quintile) to lighter (largest positive shock quintile). White regions are ones lacking data.

2.description: Commuting zone Bartik quintiles. The map plots quintiles of the Bartik shock between 2000 and 2006, which is the change in manufacturing at the national level interacted with the regional composition of the manufacturing sector at the commuting zone level. White regions are ones lacking data.
